channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: America's bone health crisis could cost $19 billion
item.description: Half of adults over 50 have weak bones, fractures are often fatal, and a doctor shortage makes prevention critical.

item.title: Global energy markets build 'Amazon of oil' logistics to stabilize prices
item.description: Modern technology allows nations and companies to quickly reroute oil shipments to hot spots, preventing price spikes.

item.title: IBM's AI powers Wimbledon with 750 million fans and 2.7 million data points
item.description: The tennis tournament serves as a testing ground for IBM's technology, helping business leaders overcome AI concerns.

item.title: Chief sustainability officers’ new pitch to CEOs: climate action isn’t about morals—it’s about money
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.
